settings.title: LINEAR ACTUATOR TECHNOLOGY
settings.subtitle: QS-210 / QS-220
settings.description:
Automotive grade performance for your sim experience.
The fastest actuators on the sim market.

settings.title: Should I get QS-210 or QS-220?
settings.description: QS-220 offers more stroke (100mm vs 60mm). If budget allows, QS-220 provides more dynamic motion with larger tilt angles. QS-210 is excellent value and adequate for most users.

settings.title: PLUG&PLAY
settings.subtitle: SIMPLE AND HASSLE-FREE SETUP PROCESS
settings.description: The installation of the QS-210/220 motion system is exceptionally straightforward. You can have it up and running within minutes. Attaching the four actuators to your aluminum cockpit is a breeze, thanks to the included mounting brackets that come with the motion set. To streamline the process further, you can easily download the Qubic Manager software with just one click, and it’s completely free of charge. Utilizing the step-by-step tutorial, you’ll effortlessly configure the system to your specific preferences. The motion system only requires a power supply of 115/230 VAC. In practically no time at all, you’ll be fully prepared to engage in thrilling races.

settings.title: IN-HOUSE SOFTWARE
settings.subtitle: EVEN MOST ADVANCED HARDWARE IS NOTHING WITHOUT GOOD SOFTWARE
settings.description: Qubic Manager is a in-house professional and specialized software for motion platforms. It is plug-and-play compatible with all major racing and flight titles on PC and is continually updated to support new titles as they are released. The Qubic Manager is a powerful engine, yet it’s simple to use, allowing you to easily adjust levels of motion, bumps, roll, and pitch with a click of a button.

settings.title: What’s in the box
settings.description: 4x Actuators / 2x Power cabinets / 1x M10 Controller / 1x Motion-lock switch / Qubic manager software
